name: DREAM Act Survey
description: Survey of 910 people on the DREAM Act by political ideology. IMS Ch. 4, 18.
studyDescription: A survey of 910 people asked respondents about their stance on the DREAM Act, which would provide a path to citizenship for undocumented immigrants brought to the US as children. Responses were recorded along with each respondent's self-identified political ideology. This was an observational survey.

variableDescriptions.ideology: The respondent's self-identified political ideology: Conservative, Moderate, or Liberal
variableDescriptions.stance: The respondent's stance on the DREAM Act: Accept or Reject

sourceDetail: OpenIntro datasets (openintro R package). IMS Ch. 4, 18. Original source: Public Religion Research Institute (PRRI) survey.
context: A survey asked respondents about their stance on the DREAM Act, which would provide a path to citizenship for undocumented immigrants brought to the US as children. Responses are broken down by political ideology.
